Description: Added throttled top 3 processes query (CPU/Memory) every 5 seconds to tooltips, storage I/O speeds (MB/s), network ping connection latency (TCP to 1.1.1.1 every 10s), GPU VRAM usage stats, and battery time calculation
Synchronized widget theme with Windows Dark/Light mode registry preference dynamically on a regular interval
Added custom neon cyan border outline control to configuration settings, defaulting to neon cyan on dark backgrounds
Handled WM_DEVICECHANGE native messages to dynamically repoll storage drives and rebuild layouts on drive insertion or extraction
Handled TaskbarCreated native window messages to automatically recover and redock OmniBar and recreate tray icons if explorer.exe crashes or restarts
Removed problematic Hidden window style flag preventing launcher scripts from auto-starting and handled fallback path checks
Refactored unified HardwareCard into 8 separate modules (base_card, cpu_display, ram_display, gpu_display, drives_display, wifi_display, battery_display, datetime_display)
Restructured codebase folder layout into controllers/, models/, views/, and installer/ packages, maintaining pristine structure
Configured explicit argtypes and restypes for GetWindowLongPtrW and SetWindowLongPtrW to prevent memory access violations and segfaults on 64-bit platforms
Safe-casted message pointers to integers inside nativeEvent() and wrapped in a try-except to avoid initialization crashes
Center-aligned labels and vector icons within layout frames for clean dashboard presentation in all scales and dock positions

Implemented dynamic vertical card height resizing based on line count and scale, resolved module import crash on opening configuration settings, added CPU temperature WMI fallback simulation, and formatted storage drives compactly
